items.title: Oliver Tree, “Miss You” and “Life Goes On” Singer, Dies at 32
items.summary: He was one of six people who died in a helicopter crash in Brazil this morning

items.title: The Fall’s Final Album Set for Autumn Release
items.summary: The English post-punk band had been working on Post-Script before Mark E. Smith’s death in 2018

items.title: Michael Becomes Highest-Grossing Music Biopic in History
items.summary: The film has reportedly brought in $911.9 million worldwide, surpassing 2018’s Bohemian Rhapsody

items.title: L’Rain Returns With New Album Fata Morgana
items.summary: Taja Cheek’s project thunders back to life with infernal single “Soulless Cycle”
